games.name: BLOUNCERROOZAL
games.description: Casino chip brick-breaker. Smash gold and silver chips with a shrinking paddle, catch falling chips to trigger multiball mayhem. Score scales with chip value.
games.controls: Mouse or ← → to move · Click or Space to launch · Catch falling chips for multiball

games.name: shootin n crackin
games.description: Pizza Slice vs the IRS. Your bouncing lasers shred briefcase auditors while you dodge the audit boss every 30 seconds. Waves get faster.
games.controls: Arrow keys or WASD to move · Space to shoot · Lasers bounce off walls

games.name: the wildcard
games.description: Bachelorette party choose-your-own-adventure. You are the wildcard. There are multiple endings. You will probably earn most of them.
games.controls: Click choices to advance the story

games.name: Stump Grandpa
games.description: 18-pair memory match against a cantankerous grandpa who heckles your mistakes, drains patience over time, and occasionally shuffles the cards when you miss.
games.controls: Click cards to flip · Match all pairs before Grandpa loses patience

games.name: Rock Em Sock Em Wrecking Ball
games.description: Uncle Earl takes on the HOA board in a fists-vs-clipboards brawl. Punch the suit-wearing enforcers before they reach you. Score 300 to flip the table.
games.controls: ← → or A/D to move · Space/Z/X or button to punch

games.name: Smithereens
games.description: Turn-based artillery. Adjust angle, charge your shot, and blast TANGO into lawn confetti. Wind changes every round. Four weapons to choose from.
games.controls: ← → to adjust angle · Hold Space/Fire to charge · 1–4 to switch weapons
